Package de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl

Class AbstractProverCore

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl.AbstractProverCore
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProverCore
Direct Known Subclasses:
ApplyStrategy
public abstract class AbstractProverCore extends Object implements ProverCore
Common class for provers which takes care of listener registration and task event propagation

  • Method Details

    • fireTaskStarted

      protected void fireTaskStarted(int maxSteps)
      propagation method for the event that a task started
      Parameters:
      maxSteps - an int with the maximal number of steps to be performed by the current task

    • fireTaskProgress

      protected void fireTaskProgress()
      propagation of task progress information to be displayed e.g. in a progress bar

    • fireTaskFinished

      protected void fireTaskFinished(TaskFinishedInfo info)
      propagation method for the event that a task has finished
      Parameters:
      info - an information object about the work done by the task e.g. number of applied rules

    • addProverTaskObserver

      public void addProverTaskObserver(ProverTaskListener observer)
      adds a listener to the prover
      Specified by:
      addProverTaskObserver in interface ProverCore
      Parameters:
      observer - the listener

    • removeProverTaskObserver

      public void removeProverTaskObserver(ProverTaskListener observer)
      removes a listener from the prover
      Specified by:
      removeProverTaskObserver in interface ProverCore
      Parameters:
      observer - the listener
